title: Fermented Flaky Treat with Marshmallow Nests
description: This one-pot Russian dish features a salty, flaky base with miniature marshmallows and a touch of fermentation for added depth of flavor. It's designed to be jain-friendly.

ingredients.name: Fermented Vegetables (e.g., fermented carrots or beets)

instructions: In a small bowl, mix the mineral water with a pinch of salt. Soak the puff pastry sheet in this mixture for about 30 seconds.
Carefully remove the soaked puff pastry and place it on an ungreased baking sheet. Sprinkle sesame seeds over the top if using.
Using a fork or your hands, poke small holes evenly across the surface of the pastry to help with air pockets formation during baking.
Arrange the halved marshmallows in the bottom half of the puff pastry base, creating nests for them. Place the chopped fermented vegetables inside each nest as well.
Bake in preheated oven for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown and crispy on top.
Remove from heat and let cool slightly before serving. Garnish with additional sesame seeds if desired.
